public.public_user_profiles.definition: select "id", "username", "display_name", "bio", "avatar_url", "cover_url", "role", "verification_status", "institution_id", "faculty", "major", "reputation_score", "reputation_level", "follower_count", "following_count", "document_count", "total_downloads", "external_links", "created_at" from "users" where "users"."status" = 'active' AND "users"."deleted_at" IS NULL
public.public_user_profiles.name: public_user_profiles
